positive: A mystical woodland creature portrait, highly detailed sticker style illustration, centered composition. The main subject is a stylized, gentle fox surrounded by swirling glowing bioluminescent flora and celestial elements like faint nebulae and crescent moons. The style should be a blend of clean vector art and watercolor fantasy, utilizing strong silhouettes and deep contrasting jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) accented by bright, luminous gold and cyan. The composition must be entirely print-friendly, with clean edges and clear delineation of the subject against a slightly darker, mood-setting background, making it suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Focus on symmetry and decorative pattern elements.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, signature, ugly, lowres, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, blurry background, photographic, realism, logos, trademarks
